Descriptionarticle: Genius Ideas®GI-033493: 1 Piece Anti-Limescale Ring Don't feel like constant descaling? With this small ring, you save yourself unnecessary work and expensive lime removers! The reusable anti-lime ring works purely without chemical substances and is particularly suitable for kettles. It is simply boiled up and ensures that that lime particles are deposited in its stainless steel meshes. This is how the ring slows down the Lime formation on the kettle itself and can thus increase the service life of the boiler. An indispensable household accessory, not only for tea drinkers! Descriptionarticle: Get excellent comfort and an innovative upgrade for your office or gaming chair with the Herzberg HG-8082, a reclining Gaming and Office chair with a footrest! Say goodbye to the back pains during long periods of sitting, experience comfort while working and take a rest, relax while watching movies, or just simply have a little nap without moving out from your desk. This ergonomic design chair is made from breathable premium PVC leather materials. The strong metal frame is covered with this eco-friendly PVC leather and 5 inches of high-density foam. The segmented padded design offers contoured support while the backrest offers a complex and meticulous padded tri-color design with a T-shape accent that present an exquisite style and enhance air permeability on the chair surface. The wingback design along with the lumbar pillow offers a multi-contact that eases any lumbar pressure while the neck pillow supports the spine. This high-level mobility is supported by a 360 degrees swivel

Descriptionarticle: Introducing the Herzberg HG-8115: Floor Mop with Water Spray – the ultimate cleaning solution that revolutionizes your floor maintenance routine. Designed for efficiency and convenience, this 360-degree rotating floor mop with a flat mop head offers unparalleled flexibility, allowing you to effortlessly navigate narrow spaces and corners without the need to bend or shift furniture. Say goodbye to the hassle of traditional mopping as this innovative spray mop offers swift, easy, and safe cleaning for a variety of flooring types, including kitchen, hardwood, marble, tile, laminate, and ceramic surfaces. With a simple trigger push, activate the spray function to dampen the mop and effectively capture dust, paper, and hair, all while safeguarding your wooden floors. Experience unmatched comfort during operation with the ergonomically designed handgrip and durable aluminum rod of the floor mop.

Titreannonce: Widmann WM-15A: 15M Retractable Air Hose Reel
Descriptionarticle: Elevate your workshop experience with the Widmann WM-15A Retractable Air Hose Reel, a versatile tool designed to enhance efficiency and convenience. Encased in sturdy plastic housing, this compact reel houses a 15-meter compressed air hose, providing ample reach for a variety of tasks. With a maximum working pressure of 16 bar, it's suitable for a wide range of compressed air applications, making it an indispensable addition to any workshop or garage. The reel's automatic locking mechanism ensures the hose stays securely in place during use, while the automatic return spring ensures effortless rewinding for quick and tidy storage when the job is done. Featuring a 1-meter supply hose with quick coupling and nozzle, this hose reel offers added versatility for smaller tasks that require proximity to the reel itself. The swivel wall bracket allows for easy rotation of up to 180 degrees, providing flexibility in positioning the reel for optimal use. Whether you're tackling automotive

Descriptionarticle: Widmann WM-SOC4: Wheel Nut 4 Pieces Features: Set of 4 pieces, to loosen or tighten the wheel bolts without damaging the alloy rim. Suitable for use on an impact wrench, torque wrench, or 1/2 “ratchet. The bushings are thin-walled and fitted with a protective nylon sleeve to prevent damage to the bolt holes of the alloy rims. 4-piece set, to unscrew or tighten wheel bolts without damaging the alloy rim. The sockets are thin-walled and fitted with a protective nylon sleeve to prevent damage to the bolt holes of the alloy rims. Descriptionarticle: Are you looking for very large capacity clothes rack and help you out drying your clothes and other garments? Introducing the Herzberg Moving Clothes Rack a multifunctional cloth rack that will surely help you out to organize your drying out your laundry. The clothes dryer can accommodate be used to dry 2 machines washed clothes or 20m of linen. The spacing between the spreading bars has been studied in such a way that the clothes are perfectly ventilated for quick drying. Equipped with 2 door hangers, the rack allows you to extend dresses, shirts or any other garment likely to wrinkle. A metal and reinforced plastic structure for more robust. The simple and fast installation will take only a few seconds. The rack is mounted on 4 feet for more stability and 6 wheels to facilitate its displacement. Once folded it takes up very little space and can easily be stored behind a door or in a closet. Features: Durable and rust free materials Stainless steel and reinforced abs Space-saving
